name: Kingland Group Holdings Limited
summary: Kingland Group Holdings Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides concrete demolition services in Hong Kong and Macau as a subcontractor. The company removes pieces or sections of concrete from concrete structures; and demolishes concrete structures or buildings through core drilling, sawing, and crushing. Its services are used in various areas, including addition and alteration works, and redevelopment projects in buildings, roads, tunnels, and underground facilities. The company was formerly known as Sing On Holdings Limited and changed its name to Kingland Group Holdings Limited in September 2018. Kingland Group Holdings Limited was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Kwun Tong, Hong Kong. Kingland Group Holdings Limited was formerly a subsidiary of CSI Properties Limited.
